F1_concept_ablation_HC1.claim: HC-1: toxicity posterior is load-bearing (drop) AND sufficient (belief-MDP optimum)

F2_beat_ZI_per_state.claim: optimal beats the constrained-ZI floor in EVERY reachable state (not just aggregate)

F3_belief_to_noise.claim: HX null ii: decorrelating the regime belief collapses performance to the no-info baseline

HC3_cross_parameter_transfer.scope_note: cross-PARAMETER-regime transfer; true cross-MODEL-FAMILY (GCMG/Brock-Hommes) needs the alternate generators (methodology must-build)

HC2_cost_sign_flip.claim: native costs FLIP the optimal action; a single-threshold tree cannot reproduce the optimum

PHASE1_VERDICT: ALL FOUR FALSIFIERS PASS — the complexity is real (belief load-bearing + sufficient, beats ZI per-state, collapses under belief-noise, transfers across parameter regimes, cost-induced sign-flip non-trivial). Proceed to Phase 2 (train the 2-level policy).
